items.title: ICE Is Expanding Across the US at Breakneck Speed. Here’s Where It’s Going Next
items.description: ICE plans to lease offices throughout the US as part of a secret, monthslong expansion campaign. WIRED is publishing dozens of these locations.

items.title: Here’s how Rivian changed the rear door manual release on the R2
items.description: Rivian, along with other automakers, has been under pressure to make the manual door releases easier to access. The new R2 SUV does that — here's how.

items.title: Boston Dynamics CEO Robert Playter steps down after 30 years at the company
items.description: Robert Playter announcd he is leaving Boston Dynamics after 30 years at the company in various roles, including six years as CEO.

items.title: RFK Jr. Says Americans Need More Protein. His Grok-Powered Food Website Disagrees
items.description: The site Realfood.gov uses Elon Musk’s Grok chatbot to dispense nutrition information—some of which contradicts the government’s new guidelines.
